title: TipSubmission
description: A submission FROM the public TO the Bronx District Attorney — a crime tip, a Civilian Complaint Unit complaint of police misconduct, a witness contact, or a records (FOIL) request. NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO structured intake today. A tip or complaint is a phone call to 718-590-2300 (Civilian Complaint Unit) and a FOIL request is a plain email to FOILREQUEST@BRONXDA.NYC.GOV — neither returns a tracking number or status. This schema serves both the write surface (submit) and the read surface (check the status of one's own submission).

submissionId.description: Server-assigned tracking number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by the office, not the submitter.

type.description: What kind of submission this is.

details.description: Free-text description — the tip, complaint, or records requested.

complaintAbout.description: For a Civilian Complaint: the nature of the allegation (e.g. police misconduct or brutality).

incidentDate.description: Date of the incident, if applicable.

anonymous.description: Submit without providing contact details. Anonymous submissions cannot receive a status update.

recordsRequested.description: For a FOIL Request: description of the records sought.
